allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Count:', len\(d.get\('results',[]\)\)\); [print\(t['content'], '-', t['project_id']\) for t in d['results'][:10]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Chores ID:', d['id']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['id'], t['content']\) for t in d['results']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['section_id'], t['content']\) for t in d['results']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['content'], t.get\('due'\)\) for t in d['results']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Rewards ID:', d['id']\)")
